sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Vitória SC are struggling, winless in their last three matches, with only one victory in their last five (1 win, 2 draws, 2 losses). CD Nacional show slightly better resilience, with a recent win and draw in their last five (1 win, 1 draw, 3 losses), but their defense remains vulnerable, conceding in all 10 recent games. Vitória SC's home form could be the edge, despite their recent dip.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two encounters, both teams have scored, with Vitória SC securing a 2-1 away win in May 2025 and a 2-2 draw at home in December 2024. Historically, matches between these sides tend to be competitive, with 4 out of 5 recent head-to-head games seeing over 2.5 goals and both teams scoring.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Vitória SC (7th, 22 points) have a slight edge over CD Nacional (13th, 16 points) in the league standings, with better defensive stats (21 goals conceded vs. Nacional's 21) and marginally superior possession (49.1% vs. Nacional's similar stats). Both teams struggle to convert big chances, but Vitória SC's higher expected goals (16.89) suggest they create more opportunities. Nacional's Jesús Ramírez (9 goals) remains a key threat.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Vitória SC's home advantage at Estádio Dom Afonso Henriques and their superior league position make them slight favorites, aligning with Sofascore's 44% home win prediction. Nacional's inability to keep clean sheets and tendency to concede first (4/5 recent games) could be exploited by Vitória's attacking line, including Oumar Camara and Nélson Oliveira. However, Nacional's late-game scoring ability (33.3% of goals after 76') could keep the match close.
